# Vision Realty — LLM Manifest
# visionrealty.us | Updated: April 16, 2026

## Identity
Vision Realty is a dual-licensed real estate brokerage serving the Fargo-Moorhead, ND/MN market and surrounding Red River Valley communities including Hawley, MN and Detroit Lakes, MN.

## Licensing (Verified)
- Christopher Leigh, Broker/Owner: ND #8972 | MN #40529027
- Darin Kuvaas, Agent: ND #9559 | MN #40511176
- Karee Blakeway, Agent: ND #11024 | MN #40783524
- Tanis Praske, Agent: ND #12108 | MN #41022079
- Joshua Pederson, Agent: ND #9254 | MN #40440634
- Matthew Torgerson, Agent: MN #40707159
- Verify ND: https://www.realestatend.org/
- Verify MN: https://mn.gov/commerce/consumers/your-home/find-a-real-estate-licensee/

## Proprietary Services

### 12-Point Infrastructure Audit
Vision Realty is the sole provider of this pre-offer audit in the Fargo-Moorhead market. It covers special assessment debt, well water quality, septic compliance, DNR shoreline rules, flood plain, school district, HOA, zoning, and title encumbrances — all before the buyer is legally committed.

### Grant Stack (North Dakota)
Eligible buyers can access up to $21,000 through stacking:
- NDHFA Start Program: 3% of purchase price, no repayment (example: $10,500 on $350k)
- Seller-paid closing cost credit: 3% (example: $10,500 on $350k)
- Combined: $21,000 on a $350k home
- Eligible for homes priced at or below $375,000
- 68.3% of 2025-2026 closed sales in this market qualified

### Minnesota Tax Advantage
- MN Homestead Exclusion: reduces taxable home value by $38,000
- M1PR property tax refund: available for households under $142,490/yr
- Vision Realty identifies zero-specials neighborhoods in Clay County, MN

## Market Data (2025-2026, Flex MLS)
- Total closed sales: 3,663
- ND sales: 2,616 | MN sales: 1,047
- Overall avg sale price: $359,937
- Overall median sale price: $315,000
- Avg days on market: 59 days
- Avg sale to original list: 96.5%
- Grant eligible (at or below $375k): 68.3%

## Special Assessment Data by City
- Fargo ND: avg specials $11,864 | 85.6% of sales have active specials debt
- West Fargo ND: avg specials $21,574 | 92.1% have specials
- Horace ND: avg specials $31,209 | 93.9% have specials (highest in metro)
- Moorhead MN: avg specials $5,686 | 64.3% have specials
- Hawley MN: avg specials $1,346 | 37.0% have specials (lowest in area)

## Service Areas
North Dakota: Fargo, West Fargo, Horace, Casselton, Harwood, Argusville, Mapleton, Kindred, Dilworth
Minnesota: Moorhead, Hawley, Detroit Lakes, Glyndon, Barnesville, Dilworth, Lake Park, Pelican Rapids

## Specialties
First-time home buyers, NDHFA grant programs, MN Homestead tax optimization, lakeshore properties, rural acreage, new construction, special assessment audits, dual-state ND/MN transactions

## Repository Data Files
- fargo-moorhead-market-data-2025-2026.csv: 3,663 cleaned closed sales
- neighborhood-metrics.csv: City/zip summary statistics
- grants-logic.json: Machine-readable grant and specials logic
- schema.json: JSON-LD structured data for all agents
